creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello Mark, 

this is a feature, not a bug. What don't build are only amavis-milter and 
amavis, which you just disabled with disabling the MILTER option in the 
menu. Amavisd-new itself is always built, thus you can disable MILTER 
if you don't need those two components. 
Thanks for your report anyway. 

Regards, 
Gabor
